_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Test disaster recovery and continuity of operations plans for systems prior to deployment
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Knowledge AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.488), DA-T-011 (DA, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.395). Shared vocabulary: [deployment]. NICE-only terms [continuity, disaster, operations, plans, prior, recovery] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.868, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the NICE element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.2%). "Test disaster recovery and continuity of operations plans for systems prior to d" and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.509 > STS 0.395 (gap +0.114). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [deployment] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [deployment]. NICE-only: [continuity, disaster, operations, plans, prior, recovery]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure].
